## What does this change?

<!-- One-line summary, then optional longer explanation. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] `node scripts/test-compile.mjs` passes locally
- [ ] I added/updated reference docs (`references/*.md`) if relevant
- [ ] If I added a new component, I added an example in `assets/examples/`
- [ ] If I changed visual styles, I attached before/after screenshots
- [ ] I followed [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
